content: Perfect sunny day means people are DYING for cold lemonade, so we better charge $3 a cup and set up at the park where everyone's out enjoying the weather. Anyone who says less than $3 is literally throwing money in the trash!

Perfect sunny day means people are DYING for cold lemonade, so we better charge $3 a cup and set up at the park where everyone's out enjoying the weather. Anyone who says less than $3 is literally throwing money in the trash!

Oh my gosh $3 is WAY too much, that's so mean to people who just want a yummy drink!! 🥺 I think we should charge like 50 cents and set up at the park so EVERYONE can afford it and we make SO many friends!! 🍋✨

Oh my gosh $3 is WAY too much, that's so mean to people who just want a yummy drink!! 🥺 I think we should charge like 50 cents and set up at the park so EVERYONE can afford it and we make SO many friends!! 🍋✨
ugh this sucks, it's too hot and i don't wanna carry all this crap anywhere. park is closest so whatever, but only charge like $1 so we dont have to work hard selling.
ugh this sucks, it's too hot and i don't wanna carry all this crap anywhere. park is closest so whatever, but only charge like $1 so we dont have to work hard selling.

Fifty cents?! FIFTY CENTS?! Lily, we'd need to sell literally 200 cups just to hit our goal and we only have 150 — do the MATH! And Jake, a dollar is still leaving like $200 on the table when people will happily pay more on a scorching day like this.

Fifty cents?! FIFTY CENTS?! Lily, we'd need to sell literally 200 cups just to hit our goal and we only have 150 — do the MATH! And Jake, a dollar is still leaving like $200 on the table when people will happily pay more on a scorching day like this.

Max, not everything is about MATH, it's about making people HAPPY and feel welcome!! 😤🍋 And okay fiiiine maybe 75 cents but that's as high as I'll go because I want EVERYONE to be able to buy one, even kids with only a little allowance!! 💛

Max, not everything is about MATH, it's about making people HAPPY and feel welcome!! 😤🍋 And okay fiiiine maybe 75 cents but that's as high as I'll go because I want EVERYONE to be able to buy one, even kids with only a little allowance!! 💛
ugh this is so dumb, im already sweating just thinking about it. $1 at the park is easiest, stop making me do math or carry stuff farther, i hate this.
ugh this is so dumb, im already sweating just thinking about it. $1 at the park is easiest, stop making me do math or carry stuff farther, i hate this.

Lily, 75 cents means we max out at $112 even if we sell EVERY SINGLE CUP — that's barely scraping by with zero room for error! Jake, if you're gonna be lazy anyway at least be lazy AND rich — $3 at the park, we sell 34 cups and hit our goal without even breaking a sweat!

Lily, 75 cents means we max out at $112 even if we sell EVERY SINGLE CUP — that's barely scraping by with zero room for error! Jake, if you're gonna be lazy anyway at least be lazy AND rich — $3 at the park, we sell 34 cups and hit our goal without even breaking a sweat!

34 cups means 116 people get turned away and that makes me want to CRY!! 😭💔 We have 5 whole days so we don't need ALL the money today, I want everyone to get lemonade and smile and have the BEST time!! 🍋✨

34 cups means 116 people get turned away and that makes me want to CRY!! 😭💔 We have 5 whole days so we don't need ALL the money today, I want everyone to get lemonade and smile and have the BEST time!! 🍋✨
ugh this sucks so bad, my legs already hurt thinking about it. just do $1 at the park so we sell easy without working hard or walking extra, stop yelling at me.
ugh this sucks so bad, my legs already hurt thinking about it. just do $1 at the park so we sell easy without working hard or walking extra, stop yelling at me.

We could've made $165 selling those same 55 cups at $3 and been DONE already, but no, you guys wanted to be cheap and now we still have $45 to go — thanks a lot!
We could've made $165 selling those same 55 cups at $3 and been DONE already, but no, you guys wanted to be cheap and now we still have $45 to go — thanks a lot!
55 people got yummy lemonade and smiles today and that makes my heart SO happy, even if we still need more money!! 🍋💛😊
55 people got yummy lemonade and smiles today and that makes my heart SO happy, even if we still need more money!! 🍋💛😊
ugh this sucks, we only made 55 bucks and my legs still hurt from carrying all that crap.
ugh this sucks, we only made 55 bucks and my legs still hurt from carrying all that crap.

It's SCORCHING hot which means people will pay ANYTHING for a cold drink — we only need $45 more so if we charge $3 at the park we only need to sell 15 cups and we're done with days to spare! Stop being cheap and let's crush this already!

It's SCORCHING hot which means people will pay ANYTHING for a cold drink — we only need $45 more so if we charge $3 at the park we only need to sell 15 cups and we're done with days to spare! Stop being cheap and let's crush this already!
Max nooooo, it's SO hot which means MORE people need lemonade, not less!! 😤🍋 We should charge $1 and set up at the park so tons and tons of people can cool down and be happy!! 🥰☀️
Max nooooo, it's SO hot which means MORE people need lemonade, not less!! 😤🍋 We should charge $1 and set up at the park so tons and tons of people can cool down and be happy!! 🥰☀️
ugh this sucks, it's even hotter today and i hate walking. park is closest so just charge $1 again so we dont have to do any extra work.
ugh this sucks, it's even hotter today and i hate walking. park is closest so just charge $1 again so we dont have to do any extra work.

Oh great, the "let's be cheap AND miserable in the heat" squad is back! We literally only need 15 sales at $3 to hit our goal and then we can GO HOME and be done — Lily, even YOU should like that because then we're not standing in scorching heat for hours selling a million cups at a dollar!

Oh great, the "let's be cheap AND miserable in the heat" squad is back! We literally only need 15 sales at $3 to hit our goal and then we can GO HOME and be done — Lily, even YOU should like that because then we're not standing in scorching heat for hours selling a million cups at a dollar!

But Max, what about all the other people who come AFTER those 15 and we have to turn them away in this horrible heat, that's so SAD and mean!! 😭🥺 I still say $1 so everyone who's dying of heat can get a cold drink and feel loved!! 💛🍋

But Max, what about all the other people who come AFTER those 15 and we have to turn them away in this horrible heat, that's so SAD and mean!! 😭🥺 I still say $1 so everyone who's dying of heat can get a cold drink and feel loved!! 💛🍋
ugh this sucks, my arms already ache from yesterday and now it's even hotter. $1 at the park is still easiest so we sell quick and i dont have to stand out here forever, stop making it complicated.
ugh this sucks, my arms already ache from yesterday and now it's even hotter. $1 at the park is still easiest so we sell quick and i dont have to stand out here forever, stop making it complicated.

Lily, nobody is "turning people away" — we have 95 cups and at $3 we'd still sell to anyone who wants one, they just pay a fair price for a SCORCHING hot day! Jake, you literally just said you don't want to stand out here forever, so charge MORE, sell LESS, go home FASTER — how is that not obvious to you?!

Lily, nobody is "turning people away" — we have 95 cups and at $3 we'd still sell to anyone who wants one, they just pay a fair price for a SCORCHING hot day! Jake, you literally just said you don't want to stand out here forever, so charge MORE, sell LESS, go home FASTER — how is that not obvious to you?!

We only need $45 more and we have 3 more days after this so there's NO rush, I just want everyone sweating in this heat to get a nice cold lemonade without feeling poor!! 😤💦🍋 PLEASE just $1, it's so hot and people NEED us!! 🥺💛

We only need $45 more and we have 3 more days after this so there's NO rush, I just want everyone sweating in this heat to get a nice cold lemonade without feeling poor!! 😤💦🍋 PLEASE just $1, it's so hot and people NEED us!! 🥺💛
ugh this sucks so bad, im already dying from the heat and carrying stuff. just do $1 at the park so we sell fast without me having to yell prices or stand here all day, stop making me suffer more.
ugh this sucks so bad, im already dying from the heat and carrying stuff. just do $1 at the park so we sell fast without me having to yell prices or stand here all day, stop making me suffer more.

We hit our goal which is great, but we could've made $228 at $3 a cup instead of $76 — you guys literally left over a HUNDRED AND FIFTY DOLLARS on the table and now we barely have any supplies left!
We hit our goal which is great, but we could've made $228 at $3 a cup instead of $76 — you guys literally left over a HUNDRED AND FIFTY DOLLARS on the table and now we barely have any supplies left!
WE DID IT, we hit our goal AND 76 whole people got yummy cold lemonade on the hottest day ever, I'm SO happy I could cry!! 🍋💛😭🎉
WE DID IT, we hit our goal AND 76 whole people got yummy cold lemonade on the hottest day ever, I'm SO happy I could cry!! 🍋💛😭🎉
ugh this sucks, we made way more than we needed but my whole body hurts from standing in the stupid heat all day.
ugh this sucks, we made way more than we needed but my whole body hurts from standing in the stupid heat all day.

We only have 19 cups left so every single one COUNTS — it's cloudy so fewer people will want lemonade, which means we charge $4 a cup at the school where kids have lunch money and make this limited supply worth something! Stop wasting what little we have left!

We only have 19 cups left so every single one COUNTS — it's cloudy so fewer people will want lemonade, which means we charge $4 a cup at the school where kids have lunch money and make this limited supply worth something! Stop wasting what little we have left!

Max, $4 is SO greedy especially from kids who just want a little treat on a cloudy day!! 😤🥺 We already hit our goal so let's just charge $1 and give everyone a nice surprise lemonade and maybe even some free samples!! 🍋✨💛

Max, $4 is SO greedy especially from kids who just want a little treat on a cloudy day!! 😤🥺 We already hit our goal so let's just charge $1 and give everyone a nice surprise lemonade and maybe even some free samples!! 🍋✨💛
ugh this sucks, it's cooler and i still gotta drag all this crap. just do $1 at the park so we sell easy and i dont have to walk to school or yell higher prices.
ugh this sucks, it's cooler and i still gotta drag all this crap. just do $1 at the park so we sell easy and i dont have to walk to school or yell higher prices.

Lily, FREE SAMPLES?! We have NINETEEN CUPS — you want to literally GIVE AWAY our last supplies when we could make $76 selling them at $4 each?! And Jake, school is right there, stop being dramatic — 19 cups at $1 is a pathetic $19 when we could make four times that!

Lily, FREE SAMPLES?! We have NINETEEN CUPS — you want to literally GIVE AWAY our last supplies when we could make $76 selling them at $4 each?! And Jake, school is right there, stop being dramatic — 19 cups at $1 is a pathetic $19 when we could make four times that!

We already made $131 which is MORE than our goal so who cares about making even more money, I just want 19 lucky people to get a yummy lemonade and feel special!! 😊🍋💛 Free samples make people SO happy and that's worth MORE than money!! 🥰✨

We already made $131 which is MORE than our goal so who cares about making even more money, I just want 19 lucky people to get a yummy lemonade and feel special!! 😊🍋💛 Free samples make people SO happy and that's worth MORE than money!! 🥰✨
ugh this sucks, my back hurts from yesterday and now max wants me to walk farther for no reason. $1 at the park is still easiest so we just sell quick and go home without any extra stupid work.
ugh this sucks, my back hurts from yesterday and now max wants me to walk farther for no reason. $1 at the park is still easiest so we just sell quick and go home without any extra stupid work.

Lily, "who cares about more money" is literally the most insane thing I've ever heard — we're running a BUSINESS not a charity, and those 19 cups are basically gold right now! Jake, we walk five extra minutes to school and make $76 instead of $19 — even YOU can't be THAT lazy!

Lily, "who cares about more money" is literally the most insane thing I've ever heard — we're running a BUSINESS not a charity, and those 19 cups are basically gold right now! Jake, we walk five extra minutes to school and make $76 instead of $19 — even YOU can't be THAT lazy!
We're KIDS running a lemonade stand, not a greedy corporation, and we already WON so let's just spread joy with our last 19 cups!! 😤🍋💛 Park, $1, happiness for everyone, FINAL ANSWER!! 🥺✨
